constraints: Each symbol of SSS is a digit from 000 to 999.
content.inputFormat: Input contains a single line consist of string SSS of length NNN - the sequence of digits.
content.outputFormat: In a single line print single integer - the minimal number of jumps he needs.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 1: Chef can directly jump from the first digit (it is 000) to the last (as it is also 000).

Explanation:
Test Case 2: Chef should follow the following path: 1‚àí2‚àí4‚àí5‚àí151 - 2 - 4 - 5 - 151‚àí2‚àí4‚àí5‚àí15.
